text: The Senate passed the landmark AI regulation bill yesterday, requiring tech companies to disclose training data and audit algorithms for bias. Silicon Valley lobbyists had fought the bill for months.
The championship final drew 85,000 fans to the stadium as the home team secured a dramatic comeback victory in the final minutes, capping a record-breaking season.
The streaming platform's new original series broke viewership records in its first weekend, fueled by viral social media clips and celebrity cameos that kept fans talking.
Researchers unveiled a neural interface chip that allows paralyzed patients to control a computer cursor with their thoughts, marking a breakthrough in assistive technology development.
The governor signed the stadium funding bill into law, committing $400 million in public money to renovate the aging downtown arena used by both the basketball and hockey franchises.
